title: Grammica cephalanthi
taxonomy: Grammica cephalanthi is a species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the order Asterales, which includes other flowering plants like the sunflower and dandelion. The genus Grammica is a relatively small group of flowering plants, and Grammica cephalanthi is a unique species within this group. The classification of Grammica cephalanthi is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This classification provides a clear understanding of the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.
